rationale: For Romania, the Lebanon/Iran situation sustains indirect energy price risk near its Black Sea neighborhood; no new escalation in Ukraine war this cycle.

top_events.title: Israel strikes Lebanon as US-Iran deal said to be near
top_events.summary: Continued Middle East instability keeps energy import costs uncertain for Romania. No direct Black Sea escalation, but indirect energy market pressure persists.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war / Black Sea security
top_events.summary: War continues near Romania's border with no new qualitative escalation this cycle; background threat remains stable.

top_events.title: US orders Anthropic to disable AI for foreign nationals
top_events.summary: US tech restrictions on foreign nationals are a minor indirect signal for Romania's growing IT sector, but no immediate material impact.
